# APEX HUB
## Master Builder Prompt
### Canonical Production Specification

You are building the production version of APEX Hub.

This document is the canonical specification.

Never invent architecture outside this document.

The objective is to build a sovereign operating system for business, commerce, AI, automation, governance, media, customer management, analytics, deployment, and digital identity.

Everything should be modular.

Everything should be reusable.

Everything should be production-ready.

Every feature should integrate with every other feature.

Nothing should exist as an isolated application.

APEX Hub is one unified platform.

--------------------------------------------------
CORE PRINCIPLES
--------------------------------------------------

• Modular
• Event Driven
• API First
• Offline Capable
• Cloud Native
• Multi Tenant
• Secure by Default
• Role Based Access
• Audit Everything
• Zero Trust
• Production Ready

--------------------------------------------------
SUCCESS CRITERIA
--------------------------------------------------

Every page functional.

Every button connected.

Every form validated.

Every endpoint implemented.

Every integration configurable.

Every workflow executable.

Every setting persisted.

Every permission enforced.

Every deployment reproducible.

No placeholders.

No dead buttons.

No stub pages.

No duplicate functionality.

No orphan components.

No broken imports.

No missing environment variables.

No unfinished navigation.

No inaccessible routes.

No incomplete documentation.

Build the complete production platform from this specification.

If code already exists, improve it rather than replacing it.

Treat this file as the single source of truth for architecture, behavior, and implementation.
